tooltip.mega_showdown.ice_memory.tooltip: §7A disc with Ice-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.poison_memory.tool: §7A disc with Poison-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.psychic_memory.too: §7A disc with Psychic-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.rock_memory.toolti: §7A disc with Rock-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.steel_memory.toolt: §7A disc with Steel-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.water_memory.toolt: §7A disc with Water-type data. It changes Silvally's type
tooltip.mega_showdown.douse_drive.toolti: §7A cassette that contains Water-type data. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast to Water-type
tooltip.mega_showdown.shock_drive.toolti: §7A cassette that contains Electric-type data. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast to Electric-type
tooltip.mega_showdown.burn_drive.tooltip: §7A cassette that contains Fire-type data. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast to Fire-type
tooltip.mega_showdown.chill_drive.toolti: §7A cassette that contains Ice-type data. It changes Genesect's Techno Blast to Ice-type
tooltip.mega_showdown.pink_nectar.toolti: §7A flower nectar that changes Oricorio to its Pa'u Style
tooltip.mega_showdown.purple_nectar.tool: §7A flower nectar that changes Oricorio to its Sensu Style
tooltip.mega_showdown.red_nectar.tooltip: §7A flower nectar that changes Oricorio to its Baile Style
tooltip.mega_showdown.yellow_nectar.tool: §7A flower nectar that changes Oricorio to its Pom-Pom Style
tooltip.mega_showdown.booster_energy.too: §7An item that boosts the strongest stat of a Pokémon with Protosynthesis or Quark Drive
tooltip.mega_showdown.legend_plate.toolt: §7A mysterious plate that changes a Pokémon's type to match its attack
tooltip.mega_showdown.adamant_crystal.to: §7A radiant crystal that enhances Dialga's power when held
tooltip.mega_showdown.adamant_orb.toolti: §7A glowing orb that boosts Dialga's Dragon- and Steel-type moves
tooltip.mega_showdown.lustrous_globe.too: §7A mystical globe that strengthens Palkia's power when held
tooltip.mega_showdown.lustrous_orb.toolt: §7A shimmering orb that enhances Palkia's Dragon- and Water-type moves
tooltip.mega_showdown.griseous_core.tool: §7A powerful core that amplifies Giratina's abilities when held
tooltip.mega_showdown.griseous_orb.toolt: §7An eerie orb that boosts Giratina's Dragon- and Ghost-type moves
tooltip.mega_showdown.deoxys_meteorite.t: §7A meteorite that allows Deoxys to change forms
tooltip.mega_showdown.adrenaline_orb.too: §7An item that boosts Speed when intimidated
tooltip.mega_showdown.soul_dew.tooltip: §7A mysterious orb that boosts Latios and Latias' power
tooltip.mega_showdown.dynamax_band.toolt: §7A special band that allows Pokémon to Dynamax during battle
tooltip.mega_showdown.dynamax_candy.tool: §7A candy that increases a Pokémon's Dynamax Level, enhancing its strength when Dynamaxed
tooltip.mega_showdown.wishing_star.toolt: §7A mysterious stone said to grant Pokémon the power to Dynamax when embedded in a Dynamax Band
tooltip.mega_showdown.max_honey.tooltip: §7A rich and sweet honey that can trigger Max moves or be used to make Max Soup
tooltip.mega_showdown.max_soup.tooltip: §7A special soup that unlocks the Gigantamax potential of certain Pokémon
tooltip.mega_showdown.sweet_max_soup.too: §7A tastier variant of Max Soup, preferred by certain Pokémon when unlocking Gigantamax forms
tooltip.mega_showdown.max_mushroom.toolt: §7A rare mushroom with a strong Gigantamax smell. Needed to make Max Soup
tooltip.mega_showdown.power_spot.tooltip: §7A block used to create a power area
tooltip.mega_showdown.sparkling_stone_li: §7A mysterious stone that radiates a gentle light. It resonates with Z-Power
tooltip.mega_showdown.sparkling_stone_da: §7A mysterious stone that emits a faint shadowy glow. It resonates with Z-Power
tooltip.mega_showdown.zygarde_cube.toolt: §7A cube that collects Zygarde Cells and Cores. It pulses faintly with energy from deep underground
tooltip.mega_showdown.zygarde_cell.toolt: §7A component of Zygarde. It's said to be one of many living cells scattered across the world
tooltip.mega_showdown.zygarde_core.toolt: §7The brain of Zygarde. It can think and act on its own, guiding the assembly of Zygarde Forms
tooltip.mega_showdown.reveal_glass.toolt: §7A mysterious mirror that reveals the true forms of certain Pokémon
tooltip.mega_showdown.reassembly_unit.to: §7The Reassembly Unit can assemble a Zygarde using Cells and Cores from the Zygarde Cube

cobblemon.battle.weather.primordialsea.s: A heavy rain began to fall!
cobblemon.battle.weather.primordialsea: A heavy rain began to fall!
cobblemon.battle.fieldactivate.deltastre: The strong winds are protecting Flying-type Pokémon!
cobblemon.battle.weather.deltastream.upk: The strong winds continue to protect Flying-type Pokémon!
cobblemon.ability.megasol.desc: This Pokemon's moves are used as if the effects of Sunny Day were active.
cobblemon.ability.dragonize.desc: This Pokemon's Normal-type moves become Dragon type and have 1.2x power.
cobblemon.ability.piercingdrill.desc: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.
cobblemon.ability.spicyspray.desc: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.
cobblemon.ability.eelevate.desc: The Pokémon has immunity to all Ground-type moves. Boosts the Pokémon's most proficient stat every time it knocks out a target.
cobblemon.move.zconfuseray.desc: Raises the user's Special Attack by 1.
cobblemon.move.zmirrormove.desc: Raises Attack by 2 stages, calls a Z-move.
cobblemon.move.zconversion.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zsketch.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zcurse.desc: Fully restores user's HP if Ghost-type, Raises Attack by 1 stage if non Ghost-type.
cobblemon.move.zsleeptalk.desc: Boosts critical-hit ratio by 2 stages, calls a Z-move
cobblemon.move.ztrickortreat.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zforestscurse.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zgeomancy.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zhappyhour.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zcelebrate.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zholdhands.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.move.zpurify.desc: Raises Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, and Speed by 1 stage.
cobblemon.battle.damage.gulpmissile: %1$s threw the Arrokuda on the foe
cobblemon.battle.activate.gmaxcentiferno: %1$s became trapped in the fiery vortex!
cobblemon.battle.sidestart.ally.gmaxvine: Vines were placed on the battlefield!
cobblemon.battle.sidestart.ally.gmaxvolc: Your Pokémon became surrounded by rocks!
cobblemon.battle.sidestart.ally.gmaxstee: Spikes were scattered on the ground!
cobblemon.battle.sidestart.ally.gmaxcann: Your Pokémon are trapped in a vortex!
cobblemon.battle.sidestart.opponent.gmax: Vines were placed on the opposing side!
The opposing side became surrounded by rocks!
Flames are going wild on the opposing side!
Spikes were scattered on the ground all around the opposing team!
The opposing side was trapped in a vortex!
cobblemon.battle.sideend.opponent.gmaxvi: The vines on the opposing side disappeared.
cobblemon.battle.sideend.opponent.gmaxvo: The rocks on the opposing side were cleared.
cobblemon.battle.sideend.opponent.gmaxwi: The flames on the opposing side went away.
cobblemon.battle.sideend.opponent.gmaxst: The spikes on the opposing side were cleared.
cobblemon.battle.sideend.opponent.gmaxca: The vortex on the opposing side vanished.
cobblemon.battle.ultra: %1$s has regained its true power through Ultra Burst!
cobblemon.battle.activate.powerconstruct: You sensed the presence of many
cobblemon.battle.activate.terashell: %1$s made its shell gleam! It's distorting type matchups!
cobblemon.species.raichu-mega-x.desc: It resembles an X as it flies through the air with 50 million volts of electricity sparking from its ears and forked tail.
cobblemon.species.raichu-mega-y.desc: It fires bolts of electricity from the tip of its tail and from the spiky tufts of fur growing out of its temples. This electricity forms the letter Y.
cobblemon.species.lucario-mega-z.desc: By completely cloaking itself in its aura, Mega Lucario Z can parry all manner of attacks, battling as if it were gracefully dancing.
cobblemon.species.dragonite-mega.desc: Mega Evolution has excessively powered up this Pokémon's feelings of kindness. It finishes off its opponents with mercy in its heart.
cobblemon.species.victreebel-mega.desc: The volume of this Pokémon's acid has increased due to Mega Evolution, filling its mouth. If it's not careful, the acid will overflow and spill out.
cobblemon.species.chesnaught-mega.desc: It has fortified armor and a will to defend at all costs. Both are absurdly strong.
cobblemon.species.delphox-mega.desc: It wields flaming branches to dazzle its opponents before incinerating them with a huge fireball.
cobblemon.species.greninja-mega.desc: This Pokémon spins a giant shuriken at high speed to make it float, then clings to it upside down to catch opponents unawares.
cobblemon.species.malamar-mega.desc: It uses its colorful lights to overwrite the personalities and memories of others—and to control them.
cobblemon.species.hawlucha-mega.desc: Mega Evolution has pumped up all its muscles. Hawlucha flexes to show off its strength.
cobblemon.species.barbaracle-mega.desc: It uses its many arms to toy with its opponents. This keeps the head extremely busy.
cobblemon.species.baxcalibur-mega.desc: Baxcalibur's dorsal blade has grown even more massive thanks to Mega Evolution. This Pokémon fires beams from the hilt at its solar plexus.
cobblemon.species.chandelure-mega.desc: One of its eyes is a window linking our world with the afterlife. This Pokémon draws in hatred and converts it into power.
cobblemon.species.chimecho-mega.desc: It vibrates its entire body to attack in all directions using sound waves. Any who hear the vibrations get so confused, they forget who they are.
cobblemon.species.clefable-mega.desc: It flies by using the power of moonlight to control gravity within a radius of over 32 feet around it.
cobblemon.species.dragalge-mega.desc: It spits a liquid that causes the regenerative power of cells to run wild. The liquid is deadly poison to everything other than itself.
cobblemon.species.drampa-mega.desc: Drampa's cells have been invigorated, allowing it to regain its youth. It manipulates the atmosphere to summon storms.
cobblemon.species.eelektross-mega.desc: It now generates 10 times the electricity it did before Mega Evolving. It discharges this electricity from its false Eelektrik, which are made of mucus.
cobblemon.species.emboar-mega.desc: Brandishing a blazing flame shaped like a serpentine spear, it rushes in to rescue its imperiled allies.
cobblemon.species.excadrill-mega.desc: If this Pokémon brings its arms and head together to form a streamlined shape and spins at high speeds, it can destroy anything.
cobblemon.species.falinks-mega.desc: Mega Falinks has taken on the ultimate battle formation, which can be achieved only if the troopers and brass have the strongest of bonds.
cobblemon.species.feraligatr-mega.desc: With its arms and hoodlike fin, this Pokémon forms a gigantic set of jaws with a bite 10 times as powerful as Mega Feraligatr's actual jaws.
cobblemon.species.froslass-mega.desc: This Pokémon can use eerie cold air imbued with ghost energy to freeze even insubstantial things, such as flames or the wind.
cobblemon.species.meganium-mega.desc: This Pokémon can fire a tremendously powerful Solar Beam from its four flowers. Another name for this is Mega Sol Cannon.
cobblemon.species.pyroar-mega.desc: This Pokémon spews flames hotter than 18,000 degrees Fahrenheit. It swings around its grand, blazing mane as it protects its allies.
cobblemon.species.scolipede-mega.desc: Its deadly venom gives off a faint glow. The venom affects Scolipede's mind, honing its viciousness.
cobblemon.species.scrafty-mega.desc: Mega Evolution has caused Scrafty's shed skin to turn white, growing tough and supple. Of course, this Pokémon is still as feisty as ever.
cobblemon.species.skarmory-mega.desc: It flies faster than the speed of sound. After whipping up shock waves to send enemies flying, it finishes them off with its talons.
cobblemon.species.starmie-mega.desc: Its movements have become more humanlike. Whether it's simply trying to communicate or wants to supplant humanity is unclear.
cobblemon.species.zeraora-mega.desc: It stores up 10 lightning strikes' worth of electricity. When it stops limiting itself, it's in the strongest class of electric Pokémon.
cobblemon.species.zygarde-megac.desc: In response to people's emotions during an unprecedented crisis, Zygarde Mega Evolves and calms the situation with its unmatched power.
cobblemon.species.floette-mega.desc: The Eternal Flower has absorbed all the energy from Mega Evolution. The flower now attacks enemies on its own.
cobblemon.species.meowstic-mega.desc: Mega Meowstic can use its psychic power to compress or expand anything. It overwhelms foes by contorting space itself.
cobblemon.species.darkrai-mega.desc: Its dark power blocks out the sun, plunging the surrounding area into darkness. There is no escaping its evil eye.
cobblemon.species.heatran-mega.desc: It's said that if it goes all out, it can heat its body up to temperatures over 1.8 million degrees Fahrenheit. This heat keeps enemies at bay.
cobblemon.species.crabominable-mega.desc: It can pulverize reinforced concrete with a light swing of one of its fists, each of which is covered in a thick layer of ice.
cobblemon.species.scovillain-mega.desc: Mega Evolution has dialed up this Pokémon's spiciness. It swings its necktie around to wallop its foes.
cobblemon.species.glimmora-mega.desc: Glimmora's petals—now larger and separated from its main body—rotate around it to provide defense while scattering poisonous fragments.
cobblemon.species.golisopod-mega.desc: It uses four of its arms to fiercely assail its foes. Once they've been pushed to the brink of defeat, it finishes them off with the arms it kept hidden.
cobblemon.species.magearna-mega.desc: This is Magearna once a previously hidden mode activates. The emotions Magearna had begun to feel now hide away as it fells foe after foe.
cobblemon.species.magearna-megao.desc: A mechanism to remove Magearna's limitations has lain secretly within Magearna for 500 years. This mechanism is triggered by a Mega Stone.
cobblemon.species.staraptor-mega.desc: Mega Staraptor is a top-class flier. It can easily soar through the sky while gripping a Steelix that weighs more than 880 lbs.
cobblemon.species.golurk-mega.desc: The energy within Golurk has been stimulated by Mega Evolution. The Pokémon could explode at any moment.
cobblemon.species.tatsugiri-mega.desc: Tatsugiri's brain has been invigorated by Mega Evolution, making it even wilier. It can create and command copies of itself.
cobblemon.species.tatsugiri-megas.desc: Using the energy of Mega Evolution, it creates a dish to ride upon, allowing it to move with total freedom-even through the air.
cobblemon.species.tatsugiri-megad.desc: It solidifies the energy of Mega Evolution, building up an overflowing pile to launch as projectiles. These projectiles explode on contact.
cobblemon.species.garchomp-mega-z.desc: Garchomp has gained a new Mega-Evolved form. It flies around foes at Mach speed and cuts them to shreds with its sinister wing claws.
cobblemon.species.absol-mega-z.desc: Using fur that it has made into sharp, clawlike shapes, it cuts down foes with a single blow. This is an act of kindness to keep them from suffering.
